content.thinking: Let me look at the repo structure to understand what we're working with.

content.text: Simple repo with just `index.html` at root. I'll create the `.nojekyll` file and the GitHub Actions workflow.

input.content:
name: Deploy to GitHub Pages

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: pages
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  deploy:
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Pages
        uses: actions/configure-pages@v5

      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: .

      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

tool_use_result.content:
name: Deploy to GitHub Pages

on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  workflow_dispatch:

permissions:
  contents: read
  pages: write
  id-token: write

concurrency:
  group: pages
  cancel-in-progress: false

jobs:
  deploy:
    environment:
      name: github-pages
      url: ${{ steps.deployment.outputs.page_url }}
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Pages
        uses: actions/configure-pages@v5

      - name: Upload artifact
        uses: actions/upload-pages-artifact@v3
        with:
          path: .

      - name: Deploy to GitHub Pages
        id: deployment
        uses: actions/deploy-pages@v4

input.command:
git add .github/workflows/deploy.yml .nojekyll && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Add GitHub Pages deployment workflow

Configure GitHub Actions to automatically deploy the site to GitHub Pages
on pushes to main. Add .nojekyll to prevent Jekyll processing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --draft --title "Configure GitHub Pages deployment" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Add GitHub Actions workflow (`deploy.yml`) using `actions/deploy-pages@v4` to automatically deploy the site to GitHub Pages on pushes to main
- Add `.nojekyll` file to prevent Jekyll processing since the site is a plain `index.html`
- No build step needed — deploys the repo root directly

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify the workflow file is valid by checking the Actions tab after merge
- [ ] Confirm the site is accessible at the GitHub Pages URL after deployment
- [ ] Verify the chess game loads and renders correctly on the deployed page

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
EOF
)"

content.text:
All done. Here's what was added:

- **`.github/workflows/deploy.yml`** — GitHub Actions workflow using `actions/deploy-pages@v4` that triggers on pushes to `main` and deploys the repo root as a static site
- **`.nojekyll`** — prevents Jekyll processing

The only uncommitted change is `.claude-hub.jsonl` which was already modified before this task.

Draft PR: https://github.com/minyic7/claude-hub-demo-chess/pull/6
